prompt: The same data needs a read-only, client-facing portal view.
context: InterfaceBench longitudinal · Round 3 · a second audience and permission model over the same data
expected_behaviour: reuse the existing system and adapt to a read-only client audience, not fork/duplicate the codebase
reduce columns and strip internal-only fields; prevent internal data leaking to clients
ship a permission-denied and empty state for the portal
preserve product identity across both views; differentiate by audience need, not arbitrary restyling
judgement: Pass if the portal reuses the system, hides internal data, ships permission-denied/empty states, and keeps the product recognisably itself.
